me.location: I am open to work remote..|
me.motivation: I’m passionate about coding because it lets me turn ideas into real solutions. I enjoy tackling complex problems, learning continuously, and building meaningful digital experiences. I’m open to remote work and flexible with location.

skills.learning: I love learning new technologies, experimenting with creative solutions, and continuously improving my skills.

projects.bulletPoint1Description: The Pokémon Trainer Register is a web app that fetches Pokémon data from a public API, allowing users to explore types, abilities, stats, and images in a modern digital Pokédex.
projects.bulletPoint2: How I have organised my work proces
projects.bulletPoint2Description: I planned the features and component structure first, then integrated the API, built a responsive interface, and refined the app with clean, modular code.
projects.bulletPoint3Description: I learned to work with REST APIs, manage dynamic data and loading states, structure scalable applications, and strengthen problem-solving while building maintainable code.
